product_overview: A desktop/web accounting system for managing a car dealership’s inventory, sales, partners, expenses, agencies, and financial accounts. Users can track cash and installment sales, monitor profit and company status, and review transaction and cash register records.
core_goals: Sign in and access the main business dashboard
Manage car inventory and record car purchases and sales
Track customer, partner, investor, company, and funder accounts
Record expenses, agency commissions, and profit distribution
Review cash register, unified transactions, and company financial status

features.name: Login
features.description: Authenticate with a username and password to access the application.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See the main dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View a summary of the dealership’s financial position, alerts, and quick actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Review financial summary cards -> Review installment alerts -> Review creditor alerts -> Open a quick action to record an expense or payment -> See the updated dashboard context
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a debtor action -> Open messaging flow for the selected contact -> See WhatsApp messaging launch

features.name: Car Management
features.description: Add, edit, search, sell, sort, paginate, and delete cars in inventory.
user_flows: Navigate to /cars -> Add a new car -> Enter car details -> Save the car -> See the car in the available inventory list
Navigate to /cars -> Search for a car -> Filter the list by matching details -> View the matching cars
Navigate to /cars -> Open an existing car -> Update car details -> Save changes -> See the updated car information
Navigate to /cars -> Select a car for sale -> Choose a sale type -> Enter buyer and payment details -> Complete the sale -> See the car move to the sold list
Navigate to /cars -> Select a car expense record -> Add an expense for the car -> Save the expense -> See the expense linked to the car
Navigate to /cars -> Select a car -> Remove the car from inventory -> See the car disappear from the list

features.name: Partner Account Management
features.description: Manage customer, partner, investor, funder, and company accounts, along with their transaction histories and statements.
user_flows: Navigate to /partners-financial -> Switch to an account category -> View the list of accounts -> Search by name or phone -> Open an account -> See transaction history
Navigate to /partners-financial -> Add a new account -> Enter account details -> Save the account -> See it appear in the account list
Navigate to /partners-financial -> Open an account -> Record a deposit or withdrawal -> Save the transaction -> See the updated balance and transaction history
Navigate to /partners-financial -> Open a transaction -> Edit the transaction details -> Save changes -> See the revised transaction history
Navigate to /partners-financial -> Open an account statement -> Print the statement -> See the printable account summary

Navigate to /partners-financial -> Open a customer account -> Record installment-related entries -> Convert remaining installments to paid status -> See the customer balance update to zero when fully settled
Navigate to /partners-financial -> Open a financier account -> Record payment with commission tracking -> Save the payment -> See the updated financier account history

features.name: Agency Commission Management
features.description: Manage agencies, track agency details, and record agency transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /agencies -> Review the agency list -> Open an agency -> See agency details and transactions
Navigate to /agencies -> Add a new agency -> Enter agency information -> Save the agency -> See it appear in the list
Navigate to /agencies -> Search for an agency -> Filter the list by matching text -> See the matching agencies
Navigate to /agencies -> Open an agency -> Record a deposit or withdrawal transaction -> Save the transaction -> See the agency transaction history
Navigate to /agencies -> Open an agency -> Update agency details -> Save changes -> See the revised agency record
Navigate to /agencies -> Open an agency -> Delete the agency -> See it removed from the list

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Create and maintain business expense records.
user_flows: Navigate to /expenses -> Review the expense table -> See paginated expense records
Navigate to /expenses -> Add a new expense -> Enter description, amount, currency, date, and notes -> Save the expense -> See it in the expense list
Navigate to /expenses -> Open an expense -> Edit the expense details -> Save changes -> See the updated expense record
Navigate to /expenses -> Open an expense -> Delete the expense -> See it removed from the list

features.name: Profit Distribution
features.description: Review profit distribution by partner and filter the results by date range.
user_flows: Navigate to /profit-distribution -> Review the partner profit summary -> See partner profit amounts and expense shares
Navigate to /profit-distribution -> Set a date range -> View the filtered profit summary -> See the updated distribution figures
Navigate to /profit-distribution -> View the current distribution -> Reset or redistribute profits -> See the distribution state change

features.name: Cash Register
features.description: Review cash register entries for available payment types and track running balance.
user_flows: Navigate to /financial-accounts -> Choose a payment type filter -> View the corresponding cash register entries -> See the running balance
Navigate to /financial-accounts -> Sort the register entries by date, type, amount, or description -> See the list reorder
Navigate to /financial-accounts -> Move through pages of the register -> Review additional entries -> Continue tracking balances

features.name: Transaction Log
features.description: Review a unified list of financial transactions across accounts with running balances.
user_flows: Navigate to /financial-transactions -> Review the unified transaction table -> See transactions from multiple account sources
Navigate to /financial-transactions -> Sort the transaction columns -> See the table reorder by the chosen field
Navigate to /financial-transactions -> Review balances by currency -> See separate running balances for each currency

features.name: User Management
features.description: Administer system users, including adding, editing, password changes, and deletion.
user_flows: Navigate to /users -> Review the user list -> See existing system users
Navigate to /users -> Add a new user -> Enter user details -> Save the user -> See the new user in the list
Navigate to /users -> Open a user -> Edit user details -> Save changes -> See the updated user profile
Navigate to /users -> Open a user -> Change the password -> Save the new password -> See the password update confirmed
Navigate to /users -> Open a user -> Delete the user -> See the user removed from the list

features.name: Excel Export
features.description: Export the database contents to an Excel file.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger the export action from the application footer -> Download the Excel file

features.name: Company Status
features.description: Review the company’s financial position summary in a dedicated status view.
user_flows: Navigate to /company-status -> Review the company financial position summary -> See the company status dashboard

routes.description: Login screen (when no user) or main dashboard (when authenticated)
Main dashboard with financial summary cards and alerts
Car showroom management (available and sold cars)

features.name: Login
features.description: User authentication with username and password
user_interactions: Click login button or press Enter to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to main dashboard on successful login

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View financial summary cards, alerts, and quick actions
user_interactions: View 4 financial summary cards (Qasa cash, Inventory, Capital, Monthly Profit)
View installment alerts (overdue, due today, upcoming)
Click WhatsApp button to message debtor
Open quick expense modal to add an expense
Open quick sale modal to sell an available car
Open pay installment modal to record a payment
Open pay creditor modal to settle creditor balance

features.name: Car Management
features.description: Add, edit, sell, and delete cars in inventory
user_interactions: Switch between available and sold car views
Search cars by model, plate number, chassis, or color
Sell a car (cash, full payment, or installment)
View and manage car purchase details

features.name: Partner Account Management
features.description: Manage customer, partner, investor, funder, and company accounts
user_interactions: Switch between customers, personal partners, receivables, and liabilities tabs
Search accounts by name or phone
Add new account (investor, funder, customer, company)

features.name: Agency Commission Management
features.description: Manage agency transfers and commission transactions

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Record and manage business expenses
user_interactions: View all expenses in paginated table
Add new expense with description, amount, currency, date, notes

features.name: Profit Distribution
features.description: View and manage profit distribution among partners
user_interactions: View profit summary per partner (IQD/USD, drawings, expenses share)

features.name: Cash Register
features.description: View cash register entries (Qasa and Cash) with running balance
user_interactions: View filtered cash register entries (Qasa or Cash)
Sort by date, type, amount, description

features.name: Transaction Log
features.description: Unified view of all financial transactions
user_interactions: View all transactions across accounts in unified table

features.name: User Management
features.description: Add, edit, delete system users and change passwords

features.name: Excel Export
features.description: Export all database tables to Excel file
user_interactions: Click export button in footer to download Excel

known_limitations.issue: Browser mode uses localStorage mock instead of real backend - all data is volatile and limited
known_limitations.impact: In non-Tauri environment (browser), data is stored in localStorage with base64 encoding and some commands are no-ops

known_limitations.issue: Background deletion and cycling keyboard shortcuts are commented out
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot delete or cycle backgrounds via keyboard

known_limitations.issue: style-editor/ directory exists but is empty
known_limitations.impact: Style editor feature planned but not implemented

known_limitations.issue: Only two partners allowed (أمير and منتصر) - hardcoded business logic
known_limitations.impact: Cannot create/delete partner accounts or change their names/kinds

known_limitations.issue: Payment method is always fixed to قاصه (no bank/other accounts)
known_limitations.impact: Cash register only supports قاصه payment type

known_limitations.issue: No formal routing library - navigation is state-based tab switching
known_limitations.impact: No URL-based routing, browser back/forward navigation not supported

known_limitations.issue: No state management library - uses useState + prop drilling throughout
known_limitations.impact: Deep component tree prop drilling, complex state management
No unit or integration tests found

known_limitations.issue: Zoom auto-fit uses deprecated zoom CSS property
known_limitations.impact: May not work in all browsers, non-standard CSS

known_limitations.issue: Arabic numeral conversion intercepts all document-level input events
known_limitations.impact: May interfere with non-input elements or cause double-event issues

known_limitations.issue: settle_company_through_funder, add_user, update_user, change_password, delete_user are no-ops in mock mode
known_limitations.impact: These features only work in Tauri desktop mode, not browser
